description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the haskell:8 Docker image and runs a before_script to update apt and install libstdc++-6-dev g++ pkg-config xz-utils make. Define a STACK_ROOT variable pointing to ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.stack and cache the .stack, .stack-work, and target directories. Add four jobs named test:8.0, test:8.2, test:8.4, and test:8.6, all in the default test stage, each executing the shell command `stack --no-terminal --resolver lts-9 --install-ghc test` (for 8.0), `stack --no-terminal --resolver lts-11 --install-ghc test` (for 8.2), `stack --no-terminal --resolver lts-12 --install-ghc test` (for 8.4), and `stack --no-terminal --resolver lts-13 --install-ghc test` (for 8.6) respectively, reusing the defined cache.
